title: wedelia podophylla
intro: Wedelia podophylla, also known as Wedelia or Long leafed Wedelia, is a flowering plant native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Wedelia podophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. In herbal preparations, the plant is used in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
